mapper.select: SELECT item.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , item.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MIN(io.PRICE) AS price , id.MFD AS mfd , id.EXP AS exp , id.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemDescription , id.ITEM_WEIGHT AS itemWeight , id.ITEM_WIDTH AS itemWidth , id.ITEM_LENGTH AS itemLength , id.ITEM_HEIGHT AS itemHeight , id.ITEM_REMARK AS itemRemark , item.DELETED_DT AS deletedDt , item.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus FROM ITEM item LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP iog ON iog.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION io ON io.GROUP_NO = iog.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_DETAIL id ON id.ITEM_NO = item.ITEM_NO WHERE item.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} GROUP BY item.ITEM_NO , item.ITEM_NAME , id.MFD , id.EXP , id.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , id.ITEM_WEIGHT , id.ITEM_WIDTH , id.ITEM_LENGTH , id.ITEM_HEIGHT , id.ITEM_REMARK , item.DELETED_DT , item.ITEM_STATUS
SELECT ii.IMG_URL FROM ITEM_IMAGES ii WHERE ii.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND ii.DELETED_DT IS NULL ORDER BY ii.SORT_ORDER ASC

SELECT iog.GROUP_NO AS groupNo , iog.GROUP_NAME AS groupName , io.OPTION_NO AS optionNo , io.OPTION_NAME AS optionName , io.PRICE AS price FROM ITEM_OPTION_GROUP iog JOIN ITEM_OPTION io ON io.GROUP_NO = iog.GROUP_NO WHERE iog.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY iog.GROUP_NO, io.OPTION_NO
